title: Whirlpool Galaxy
description: Galaxy in the constellation Canes Venatici
extract: The Whirlpool Galaxy, also known as Messier 51a (M51a) or NGC 5194, is an interacting grand-design spiral galaxy with a Seyfert 2 active galactic nucleus. It lies in the constellation Canes Venatici, and was the first galaxy to be classified as a spiral galaxy. It is 31 million light-years away and 23.58 kiloparsecs (76,900 ly) in diameter.
